task_context.actionable_question: Which weeks did I disengage and why might that be?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Describe engagement pattern. Flag weeks with sharp drops. Note if drop precedes assessment.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: Your engagement has shown a significant decline over the weeks, with a notable drop in activity. This pattern suggests that you may be facing challenges in staying connected with the course material, especially during certain weeks.

Insights: Sharp Decline in Engagement: You experienced a sharp drop in weekly clicks from 98 in week 1 to just 4 in week 2, indicating a sudden disengagement. This trend continued with several weeks showing very low activity, particularly week 18 with only 1 click. | Consistent Low Engagement: After the initial drop, your engagement remained low, with several weeks recording fewer than 10 clicks. This consistent low activity suggests a struggle to maintain interest or manage time effectively.

Educational implications: Low engagement can impact your understanding of the course material and overall performance.

Recommendations: high - Set a weekly study schedule - Creating a consistent study routine can help you stay engaged and manage your time better. | medium - Reach out for support - If you're facing challenges, don't hesitate to ask for help from instructors or peers.

explanation.summary: Your engagement has shown a significant decline over the weeks, with a notable drop in activity. This pattern suggests that you may be facing challenges in staying connected with the course material, especially during certain weeks.

insights.title: Sharp Decline in Engagement
insights.description: You experienced a sharp drop in weekly clicks from 98 in week 1 to just 4 in week 2, indicating a sudden disengagement. This trend continued with several weeks showing very low activity, particularly week 18 with only 1 click.

insights.title: Consistent Low Engagement
insights.description: After the initial drop, your engagement remained low, with several weeks recording fewer than 10 clicks. This consistent low activity suggests a struggle to maintain interest or manage time effectively.

educational_implications: Low engagement can impact your understanding of the course material and overall performance.

recommendations.rationale: Creating a consistent study routine can help you stay engaged and manage your time better.
If you're facing challenges, don't hesitate to ask for help from instructors or peers.

confidence.reason: The data shows clear trends in engagement over time.

evaluation_constraints.description: Treat temporal proximity between engagement drops and assessments as an association, not proof that the assessment caused the drop.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
